queries: Walt Disney DIS Q1 2026 earnings results

results.title: The Walt Disney Company Reports First Quarter Earnings for Fiscal 2026
results.snippet: The Walt Disney Company reported Q1 2026 revenues of $26.0 billion, up 5% year-over-year. Diluted EPS decreased to $1.34 and adjusted EPS was $1.63, with total segment operating income down 9% to $4.6 billion.

results.title: The Walt Disney Company Reports First Quarter Earnings ...
results.snippet: Disney announced fiscal Q1 2026 results showing 5% revenue growth to $26.0 billion. Income before taxes was comparable to prior year while adjusted EPS fell to $1.63 from $1.76.

results.title: The Walt Disney Company - Financials - Quarterly Results
results.snippet: Official quarterly results for Q1 fiscal 2026 detail revenues rising 5% to $25.981 billion. Diluted EPS came in at $1.34 compared to $1.40 in the prior year period.

results.title: Disney (DIS) earnings Q1 2026
results.snippet: Disney beat expectations with adjusted EPS of $1.63 and revenue of $25.98 billion in Q1 2026. Net income was $2.48 billion or $1.34 per share, down from the previous year.

results.title: The Walt Disney Company Earnings Analysis – Q1 Fiscal ...
results.snippet: Analysis of Q1 2026 results shows revenue up 5% to $26.0 billion but segment operating income down 9% to $4.6 billion. Adjusted EPS of $1.63 beat estimates despite margin pressures.

results.title: How High Can Disney's Streaming Profit Go?
results.snippet: Disney's DTC streaming segment, including Disney+ and Hulu, generated $1.3 billion in operating income in fiscal 2025, up ninefold from the prior year. Management forecasts $2.1 billion in operating income for fiscal 2026, representing 62% growth and a 10% operating margin.

results.title: Disney's Profit Wilts, Despite Streaming and Parks Growth
results.snippet: Disney reported a 72% increase in streaming profit to $450 million in its first quarter of 2026, driven by Disney+, Hulu, and ESPN+. However, overall company profit declined due to higher movie costs and challenges in traditional TV.

results.title: Disney Streaming Turns Profitable, Projects $2.1B Income for FY 2026
results.snippet: Disney's streaming unit achieved $1.3 billion in operating income for fiscal 2025 after turning profitable. It is projected to reach $2.1 billion in FY 2026 with a 10% margin, though this still trails Netflix's profitability.

results.title: Disney earnings to pickup in second half of 2026 on streaming, parks
results.snippet: Analysts expect Disney's adjusted earnings per share to rise 12% in fiscal 2026, supported by improved streaming profitability and park growth. Streaming operating income outperformed guidance in the first quarter despite offsets from other segments.

results.title: Disney+ & Hulu Profit Surge: $1.3B FY 2025 Income, 2026 Projections
results.snippet: Disney's direct-to-consumer streaming operations delivered $1.3 billion in operating income for FY 2025 and are expected to generate $2.1 billion in FY 2026 at a 10% margin. Revenue is primarily from subscriptions on an annualized run rate of $21.4 billion.

results.title: 2026-2027 Disney World Crowd Calendar | UPDATED
results.snippet: Our updated Walt Disney World Crowd Calendar predicts how crowded each Disney theme park will be on any given day during 2026 and 2027. It helps visitors find the best times by forecasting attendance levels for the next 12 months.

results.title: 2026 Disney World Crowd Calendar (best times to go)
results.snippet: This guide identifies the best weeks for lower crowds at Disney World in 2026, including January 20–30, May 4–21, and August 10–31. It offers monthly breakdowns and top picks based on expected attendance, weather, and events.

results.title: Yes, Disney World Attendance Is Still Dropping in 2026! ...
results.snippet: This video analyzes continuing drops in Disney World attendance into 2026, suggesting summers could be even emptier. It examines patterns from recent years and forecasts what visitors might experience.

results.title: Why Disney World Crowds Could Surge in 2026!
results.snippet: The article discusses potential surges in Disney World crowds for 2026 despite recent attendance declines of about 1%. Factors like tax refunds, discounts, and recovery from prior impacts could drive higher attendance.

results.title: Orlando Crowd Calendar
results.snippet: This calendar shows crowd levels, events, and hours for Disney and other Orlando theme parks, including April 2026 data. It supports customized planning to find the best visiting days.
